candidates.title: Draft the customer-facing support handoff checklist
candidates.trigger: Priya committed to drafting the launch support handoff checklist before review.
candidates.inferred_intent: Prepare a reviewable checklist that explains escalation and first-hour incident ownership before the customer update is sent.
proposed_done_criteria: Checklist draft includes the support escalation path.
Checklist draft identifies who watches the first-hour incident channel.
Checklist draft is sent to Maya and Leo for review.
candidates.uncertainty: The exact checklist template is not specified in the transcript.
candidates.extraction_rationale: The transcript includes an explicit commitment from Priya, review recipients, deadline, and required checklist contents.

candidates.title: Confirm final import status wording for the release note
candidates.trigger: Theo noted that the release note still uses older import status wording.
candidates.inferred_intent: Get the final status labels from design so Engineering can update the release note.
proposed_done_criteria: Final import status labels are confirmed with design.
Exact wording is posted in the launch room.
Engineering has enough information to update the release note.
candidates.uncertainty: The transcript does not include the final labels themselves.
candidates.extraction_rationale: The transcript states that the release note wording is stale and Maya will confirm and post the final wording.
